Scam awareness • search-first content site

Spot red flags before you lose money, data, or access.

Plain-English guides to help people spot online scams before money or data is lost.

Website scams Delivery texts Marketplace fraud Crypto scams Phone scams
Browse guides View categories
🔎

This site ships with a static search index at /search.json.

What this site is built to do

  • Rank for long-tail scam and phishing queries
  • Load fast on GitHub Pages with a custom domain
  • Support AdSense code insertion across all pages
  • Scale through content updates in a simple JSON workflow
Website Scams

Is This Website a Scam? A Practical Checklist Before You Buy

A plain-English checklist for judging whether a website is legitimate before you enter payment details.

2026-04-10

Text Message Scams

Royal Mail Text Scam Guide: How to Spot the Common Delivery Message Trap

How fake parcel delivery texts work, what signs to check, and what to do if you clicked the link.

2026-04-09

Email Scams

PayPal Email Scam Signs: How to Check a Message Without Panicking

A checklist for reviewing suspicious PayPal emails and deciding whether a message is genuine.

2026-04-08

Payment Scams

Bank Transfer Scam Warning Signs Before You Send Money

How to assess pressure tactics, fake invoices, account changes, and impersonation before a transfer.

2026-04-07

Investment Scams

Crypto Investment Scam Checklist: What to Check Before You Send Funds

A practical pre-send checklist for crypto investment offers, recovery rooms, and fake trading platforms.

2026-04-06

Phone Scams

Phone Call Scam Red Flags: What to Do When a Caller Sounds Convincing

How to handle urgent, persuasive calls that claim to be from your bank, HMRC, police, or a delivery firm.

2026-04-05

Simple rule: do not trust the link, the caller, or the payment request until you verify it independently.

That single rule neutralises a large share of modern consumer scams.
